job_description:
Senior Full-Stack Engineer — Series B SaaS Startup

We're looking for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer to join our core platform team. You'll own the design and implementation of critical user-facing features and backend APIs powering our analytics dashboard.

Required Skills:
- Python (FastAPI or Django) — 4+ years production experience
- React + TypeScript — component architecture, state management
- PostgreSQL — schema design, query optimization
- Docker & Kubernetes — containerized deployments
- AWS or GCP — cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines

Nice to Have:
- Machine learning / data pipeline experience
- GraphQL API design
- Terraform / infrastructure-as-code

Experience: 5-8 years in software engineering
resumes:
Arjun Mehta
Senior Software Engineer | 6 years experience

Skills: Python, FastAPI, React, TypeScript, Docker, PostgreSQL, AWS, Machine Learning, Kubernetes
Education: M.Tech Computer Science, IIT Bombay

Experience:
- Lead Engineer at DataSync (2021-present): Built real-time analytics API using FastAPI + PostgreSQL serving 2M daily requests. Deployed on AWS EKS with Docker/Kubernetes. Led team of 4 engineers.
- Backend Developer at TechCorp (2019-2021): Developed REST APIs in Python/Django. Managed PostgreSQL databases with 500GB+ data. Set up CI/CD pipelines on AWS.
- Junior Developer at StartupXYZ (2018-2019): Full-stack React + Python development. Docker containerization.

Summary: Full-stack engineer with 6 years building scalable Python microservices and ML pipelines. Strong match for senior full-stack roles requiring Python, React, and cloud infrastructure expertise.

Priya Sharma
Data Engineer | 4 years experience

Skills: Python, Apache Spark, Airflow, SQL, GCP, Kafka, Docker, PostgreSQL
Education: B.Tech Computer Science, NIT Trichy

Experience:
- Data Engineer at AnalyticsCo (2022-present): Built batch and streaming data pipelines using Spark and Kafka on GCP. Reduced ETL latency by 60%.
- Junior Data Engineer at DataWorks (2020-2022): SQL query optimization on PostgreSQL. Python scripting for data transformation. Docker for local development.

Summary: Data engineer specializing in batch and streaming pipelines. Has Python and PostgreSQL experience but limited frontend/React and cloud deployment skills. Partial match for full-stack roles.

James Wilson
Frontend Developer | 2 years experience

Skills: JavaScript, HTML, CSS, jQuery, Bootstrap, Git
Education: BS Information Technology, State University

Experience:
- Junior Frontend Developer at WebAgency (2023-present): Built marketing websites using HTML/CSS/JavaScript. Used jQuery for interactivity. Git for version control.
- Intern at SmallBiz (2022-2023): Updated WordPress websites. Basic responsive design.

Summary: Early-career frontend developer with 2 years of experience in basic web technologies. No Python, React, Docker, or cloud experience. Weak match for senior full-stack engineering roles.
